title: sunaptea urbani
side_effects: Sunaptea urbani can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems due to the release of toxic compounds when the plant's roots are exposed to air. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also cause nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, improper use of sunaptea urbani may lead to cardiac issues, such as arrhythmias and tachycardia, particularly in individuals with pre-existing heart conditions. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these potential side effects.
